overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the futuristic Night City. The clip follows the player character through commercial streets with towering triangular buildings and digital billboards, transitioning through intersections and past urban details including homeless encampments and street vendors.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with distinctive triangular skyscrapers looming ahead. The player character in a bright pink jacket walks forward past benches and planters, then exits the frame to the right while the camera continues moving forward.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a busy urban intersection, crossing white-striped crosswalks as vehicles pass by. A white vintage car drives through the scene before the camera turns left, shifting the perspective of the surrounding skyscrapers.

segments.scene_description: Moving down a commercial street beneath a massive elevated highway overpass, the camera passes a pedestrian in a red plaid shirt and continues along the sidewalk. A distinctive homeless encampment with a bright yellow umbrella appears on the right, with steam rising from vents in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera continues down the bustling commercial sidewalk, passing street vendors and colorful digital billboards including a prominent red neon FOODSTUFFS sign. The camera catches up to a character with pink pants and purple hair walking ahead, following them as they navigate through the moderate crowd toward the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban corridor that transitions from a wide sidewalk of towering skyscrapers into a dense, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by tracking a character in a pink jacket past planters and benches beneath triangular buildings before the camera glides forward, leaving the character behind to cross a busy intersection. As the camera turns left and passes a vintage white car, the perspective shifts toward a massive elevated highway overpass where steam rises from vents near a homeless encampment marked by a bright yellow umbrella. The scene then opens into a bustling commercial street filled with street vendors and glowing digital billboards, including a prominent red neon FOODSTUFFS sign. Finally, the camera catches up to and follows a character with purple hair and pink pants as they navigate through the crowd toward a distant intersection.
